message:
fix(core): improve data integrity across buffer_shim, models cache, RPC, and session store

Four targeted reliability improvements:

buffer_shim.rs:
- Add Uint8Array fill support in the Buffer.fill() polyfill, handling
  the case where the fill value is a Uint8Array (not just number/string)
- Prevents silent no-op when fill() is called with typed array values

models.rs:
- Clean up temp file on failed JSON serialization or flush in
  persist_legacy_generated_models_cache()
- Previously a failed write would leave orphaned .tmp files on disk

rpc.rs:
- Include SessionMessage::Custom variant in the RPC message forwarding
  match arm alongside User/Assistant/ToolResult/BashExecution
- Ensures custom message types are properly relayed to RPC clients

session_store_v2.rs:
- Fix segment file truncation: use truncate(is_new_segment) so fresh
  segments start clean while appends don't clobber existing data
- Simplify byte_offset tracking by reading position after seek rather
  than separate metadata() call
- Add temp file cleanup on write failure in write_checkpoint() and
  finalize_manifest() — previously failed writes left orphaned .tmp
  files that could cause confusion on recovery

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
